properties.name: Wildflower
properties.description: A small, pale yellow flower grows near the edge of the gully. Its petals are delicate and dusted with pollen.
properties.aiPrompt: The wildflower is a simple natural element found in the forest near the brick building. Picking it is possible but it serves no mechanical purpose other than flavor.

properties.name: At End Of Road
properties.description: You are standing at the end of a road before a small brick building. Around you is a forest. A small stream flows out of the building and down a gully.

scenery.description: The gully is a shallow, rocky trench carved by the stream. It is filled with loose gravel and thick patches of mud that lead away into the dense woods.
scenery.rejection: The sides are too steep and slippery to climb down safely.
